exercises.title: Verb Conjugation
exercises.description:
Write the correct form:
1. She ___ (work) at a hospital.
2. They ___ (not/play) football today.
3. ___ he ___ (study) English?
4. The children ___ (run) in the park right now.
5. Water ___ (boil) at 100 degrees.
hints: Check: is it a habit (simple present) or happening now (continuous)?
For he/she/it, add -s in simple present

solution.code:
1. works (habit)
2. are not playing (now)
3. Does...study (question)
4. are running (now)
5. boils (fact)

exercises.title: Stative vs Action Verbs
exercises.description:
Decide: should these be simple present or present continuous?
1. I ___ (know) the answer.
2. She ___ (eat) lunch right now.
3. We ___ (love) our country.
4. He ___ (think) about the problem.
5. They ___ (seem) happy today.
hints: Know, love, seem are stative — always simple present
Eat, think (as mental activity) can be both

solution.code:
1. know (stative — never continuous)
2. is eating (action — happening now)
3. love (stative — permanent feeling)
4. is thinking (action — considering now)
5. seem (stative — describing state)
